Name: -1_accord_genesis_new_g90
Representative_Docs: ["Hello everyone, I'm Steve Kincaid with Honda and we're celebrating the 40th anniversary of the Honda Accord, the best-selling car in America over the past four decades. Today I'm here with the all-new 2017 Accord Hybrid. the most technologically advanced Accord we've ever made.", "Over Accord's 40-year history, more than 13 million Accords have been sold to American car buyers. And Accord has played a big part in Honda's U.S. exports since the first U.S.-made Accord boarded a ship in 1987. For four decades, Accord has defined Honda's core values.", "We'd like to think that this Accord will ace the ballet test like no other Accord that's come before it. Of course, our story is much more than just styling. This will be the most fun-to-drive Accord ever."]

Name: 0_car_new
Representative_Docs: ["Hi there, I'm Johnny Lieberman with Motor Trend and I am driving the all-new Karma Rivero GT. This is a plug-in hybrid vehicle. That means it's got a battery and an electric motor as well as a gasoline engine.", "Range that's a thousand kilometer range This would be the first time an electric vehicle breaks a thousand kilometers a production electric vehicle will travel more than a thousand kilometers a single charge at highway speed But you'll be able to travel from LA to San Francisco and back at highway speed without recharging The point of doing this is to just give the hardcore smackdown to gasoline cars Drive driving a gasoline sports car is gonna feel like a steam engine with a side of quiche This thing will have three motors.", "So everything again has that feeling, has that feeling of like a very nice 7 series leather so you don't get you don't feel like okay I'm inside of an eco-friendly car obviously the quietness gives you that sensation and and the overall feeling of the car gives you the sensation of a futuristic eco-friendly car but the interior feels as luxurious as you would anticipate a brand new $130,000 BMW would so we'll go through some of the drive modes and we'll talk about this instrument cluster moving over here to the left you have your AC vents which are manually operated with a little tab centrally located tab and everything feels really quality everything feels really tangible to the touch so you know nothing is loose everything has a really quality heavy sensation to it you have your light switch your automatic off your daytime running lamps and full-on and your interior cabin lighting so you do have some information here at the bottom left that can be cycled through with this BC button so as I push this BC button this cycles through and of course you have your turn signals here on this stock functioning your turn signal is pretty easy everything is just like other BMWs so if you're if you're a BMW fan or you have other BMW cars getting into this car would be really easy to function and start driving right away you have your cruise control settings here on the left hand side of the steering wheel and this car is equipped with this, it automatically knows the speed limit where you are and it'll give you a visual signal of the speed limit here and there's a visual, I'm not sure if it shows on the camera, but there's a visual signal of the speed limit in my windscreen with the heads up display, full color heads up display."]

Name: 1_volvo_xc90_you_s60
Representative_Docs: ["A year from now we'll be showing you the all-new XC90, which will feature Volvo's next generation of safety and driver support technologies. Most importantly though, the all-new XC90 will be the first Volvo model assembled on a scalable platform architecture, or what we like to call it, a SPOT. Going forward, all new Volvo models will be built on these highly adaptive, or should I say, scalable platforms.", "Now, let's see what makes the new XC90 so special. Thank you. Hi, I'm Florian from the design team here at Volvo and I would like to talk you through the car.", 'There was huge interest when the all-new Volvo XC90 was unveiled to the world press. This car is the start signal for a new era for Volvo cars and the Volvo brand, where design, technology, environmental performance and safety are at a new, higher level. Volvo is well known to everybody, but now they see Volvo developing in direction, bringing in high-tech, very advanced solutions and technology really to strengthen our brand.']

Name: 2_nissan_leaf_aria_new
Representative_Docs: ['He will talk about the expectations of the new Nissan LEAF and explain what Nissan Intelligent Mobility is all about. Ladies and gentlemen, good morning and welcome. Let me start by making one thing clear.', 'It is my honor to officially announce the launch of the new Nissan LEAF in Japan with all of you here. Nissan takes pride in being an EV pioneer along with the owners of the current Nissan LEAF. The launch of the new Nissan LEAF comes when the entire world is shifting toward era of EV.', 'The new Nissan LEAF represents technological Nissan or Nissan of Technology, which is a traditional term associated with Nissan in Japanese language, and this is definitely a great opportunity of which we intend to make the most. While the current Nissan LEAF was the EV pioneer, the new Nissan LEAF has the real potential to become the core of the company. The new Nissan Leaf will drive the Nissan Intelligent Mobility forward.']

Name: 3_polestar_car_you_electric
Representative_Docs: ['Polestar stands for pure, progressive performance. And this is our first product, Polestar 1.', "So, this great awesome design became our Polestar 2, and we're going to show it to you in a minute. But there's another reason why this is a truly exciting day for us here today, because Polestar 2 is our first pure electric Polestar, a true battery electric car. Now, Polestar is dedicated to electric mobility.", 'Bye-bye, Dumbo. Next, let me show you around inside Polestar 2. Now, how do we get in?']

Name: 4_mustang_mach_vehicle_from
Representative_Docs: ["So now it's time to take a closer look at what it's like actually living with the Mustang Mach-E. And over to my first guest, he is the Mustang Mach-E product manager for Europe, a fellow EV enthusiast, and someone who's been very fortunate to actually live with the Mustang Mach-E prototype for a while now. Stefan Tiniman, welcome, so good to see you. Hello, Nikki.", "And, you know, the other thing is, is that once we knew we were really able to deliver Mustang performance, then the let's say the excitement, the enthusiasm around delivering our first all electric vehicle as a Mustang just got turned to 11. what we first called Mustang-inspired proposals, but these actually became very quickly the Mustang Mach-E proposals.", 'I got my first Mustang before I could even drive. My Mustang is everything to me. I grew up in Vietnam and my first image of a Mustang was everything that I thought was great about America.']

Name: 5_rogue_kix_nissan_midnight
Representative_Docs: ['Rogue is all about style. Rogue is all about sophistication. Rogue is all about game-changing technology.', 'The Neeshawn Edition, by the way, excuse me, the Midnight Edition for the Rogue is available in multiple colors. Head to Nissan.com if you want to check those out and get more details on exactly what the Rogue offers. What I love about it, again, is crossover of the year.', 'Not only do we have a live performance coming up, we also have a reveal. Now I took you through and showed you the 100% electric, of course, Nissan Leaf, that Midnight Edition Rogue, and of course these three amazing vehicles for the collaboration with Star Wars The Last Jedi in theaters December 15th.']

Name: 6_pacifica_minivan_chrysler_new
Representative_Docs: ['The 2017 Pacifica will be in dealer showrooms this spring and the Pacifica Hybrid later this year. with an all-new architecture, new level of convenience, safety, connectivity, entertainment, cargo, and passenger space unmatched by the competition, all wrapped in a stylish design that will bring pride of ownership to the minivan segment, a no compromise offering, eight passenger seating, or 80 miles per gallon, only from Chrysler. Thank you.', "When it comes to Chrysler and Pacifica, we're all about defining segments and defining moments. And what you see on stage here is yet another. With its updated athletic look, the 21 Pacifica has more technology, more functionality, and now with the segment's most advanced all-wheel drive system, the segment's most capability, and more standard safety than any other vehicle in the industry.", "The all-new 2017 Chrysler Pacifica delivers on everything our owners said they needed, wanted, and more. So let's take a minute to unbox the innovations you'll find in the new Pacifica. From any angle, it's easy to see that Pacifica makes a bold styling statement."]
